headline: America can't get enough of protein. The dairy industry can't keep up
summary: Demand for whey protein is off the charts as American diet trends change and GLP-1s boom, and the dairy industry is struggling to produce enough.

raw.headline: America can't get enough of protein. The dairy industry can't keep up

headline: Is PepsiCo (PEP) One of the 10 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy for Passive Income?
summary: PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ:PEP) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy for Passive Income. On June 25, Jefferies lowered its price recommendation on PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ:PEP) to $162 from $164. It reiterated a Hold rating on the stock. In its Q2 earnings preview, the firm said PepsiCo’s year-to-date performance in the U.S. has […]

headline: From protein coffee to CBD soda: How brands are cashing in on the functional beverage boom
summary: "We're selling [almost] as much protein cold foam as we do flat whites," Starbuck's EMEA Manager of Beverage Development Sam Henderson told CNBC.
